rules.rule_text:
rule CowTunnel
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects CowTunnel"
		author = "RussianPanda"
		date = "2025-12-8"
		hash = "776850a1e6d6915e9bf35aa83554616129acd94e3a3f6673bd6ddaec530f4273"

	strings:
		$s1 = "cannot create proxy service, it should not happenned!"
		$s2 = "[nss] encrypt_data"
		$s3 = "[nss] decrypt_data"

	condition:
		uint32( 0 ) == 0x464c457f and all of them
}
